nasb.text: From them will come the cornerstone, From them the tent peg, From them the bow of battle, From them every ruler, all of them together.

esv.text: From him shall come the cornerstone, from him the tent peg, from him the battle bow, from him every ruler—all of them together.

cnv.text: 房角石、 帳棚樁、 作戰的弓 和所有的統治者，都從猶大而出。

ccb.text: 房角石、帐篷的橛子、战弓， 以及所有掌权者必出自犹大。
